management_guide_subtitle: Everything you need to manage your apps and payments
management_guide_quick_desc: Welcome to the ZeusX Partner Program. This console is your command center for managing your business autonomously and efficiently.
management_guide_app_mgmt_1: Create and configure your applications in a few clicks. The system automatically generates dedicated payment links for your customers.
management_guide_app_mgmt_2: Accounting: track your earnings and the service fee owed to ZeusX. The 'Debt Monitoring' section always shows you the updated balance.
management_guide_app_mgmt_3: Customer Status: monitor in real-time who is active and who is expiring. Apps are automatically activated and suspended by the system based on payments received.
management_guide_commercial_desc: To maximize profits and ensure customer satisfaction, we suggest you:
management_guide_sales_1: You have full freedom to set the final selling price for your customers. Remember that the fixed fee for ZeusX is €50/month; everything exceeding this amount is your net profit.
management_guide_sales_2: The value of local support: your customers choose you for your presence and assistance. Offer customized configurations and quick support: this is the competitive advantage that rewards you over large online operators.
management_guide_sales_3: Aim for continuity: manage your customers' expirations carefully. A timely renewal ensures the service is never interrupted, protecting your recurring revenue stream.
management_faq_a1: For each active app, a fixed fee of €50/month is provided, registered as debt owed to ZeusX.
management_faq_q2: What happens if a customer cancels their subscription?
management_faq_a2: The system receives automatic notification: the app is deactivated and the commission ceases to accrue from the following month.
management_faq_a3: The model is based on partnership. The Takeover option is a technical emergency measure, activatable only in case of prolonged non-payment or partner inactivity, to ensure service continuity for the end user.
management_legal_partnership_desc: The relationship between ZeusX and the Partner is of a commercial nature between independent entities. The Partner is solely responsible for their own tax and commercial management.
management_legal_liability_desc: The platform is provided 'as is'. ZeusX is not responsible for missed sales or losses resulting from improper management by the Partner.
management_legal_takeover_desc: To protect the end user, ZeusX reserves the right to intervene in app management in case of terms violation, non-payment, or partner inactivity.
management_legal_acceptance_desc: Use of the ZeusX platform implies full acceptance of these terms.

info_subtitle: Choose the plan that best suits your business. All plans include a 30-day free trial.
info_billing_step1_desc: Pay once to unlock the app slots of the chosen plan. The payment is single, not recurring.
info_billing_step2_desc: Each active app has a monthly fee of the chosen plan. The first month is free for all apps.
info_billing_step3_desc: When you run out of slots, you can repurchase the same plan to regenerate all available slots.
info_terms_section1_desc: ZeusX is an AI-based management software generation platform. Each purchased plan includes a number of "app slots" that correspond to the maximum number of management software you can create and manage simultaneously.
info_terms_section2_desc: The setup payment is one-time and non-recurring. Each purchased app slot can be used to create a management software. Once created, the slot is permanently occupied and is not freed even if the app is deleted. The monthly fee per active app is charged monthly starting from the second month (the first month is free for each new app).
info_terms_section3_desc: Each created app permanently occupies a slot, regardless of whether it is subsequently deleted. This is because creating the app has already involved the use of computational and storage resources. When all the slots of a plan are exhausted, it is possible to repurchase the same plan to regenerate the number of available slots.
info_terms_section4_desc: Each plan includes a 30-day trial period for each created app. During the trial period, no monthly fee is charged. At the end of the trial, the monthly fee is automatically charged unless the app is deactivated.
info_terms_section5_desc: The setup payment is non-refundable. No partial refunds are provided for unused slots. You can delete your account at any time, but payments already made will not be refunded.
info_terms_section6_desc: The management software generated through ZeusX are the property of the customer who commissioned them. ZeusX reserves the right to use anonymous and aggregated data to improve its services.
info_terms_section7_desc: ZeusX provides the service "as is" without express or implied warranties. In no case will ZeusX be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use of the service.
info_terms_section8_desc: ZeusX reserves the right to change these terms and conditions at any time. Changes will be communicated to registered users and will take effect 30 days after the publication date.
